otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for stays up to 30 days under China's unilateral trial, currently extended to 31 December 2026
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months and have at least 2 blank pages
For stays longer than 30 days or non-tourist purposes you must obtain a visa in advance
sourceNote: gov.uk China travel advice — visa-free visits up to 30 days under the trial scheme running to 31 December 2026 (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/china/entry-requirements)
